raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Jurors serving on criminal trials can be asked to examine the most violent crimes they have ever encountered.",
    "Jurors are prohibited from discussing their experiences with anyone while going through the trial process.",
    "Jurors in Santa Barbara County have been asked to evaluate evidence in very difficult cases involving murder and sexual assault.",
    "Jurors have reported impacts on their mental wellness, including nightmares and strained relationships, due to their experiences during trials.",
    "The Judicial Council has identified temporary signs of distress that can follow jury duty.",
    "There is currently no effective distribution method for mental wellness information to jurors after their service.",
    "Jurors are often unprepared for the difficult issues they will be exposed to while fulfilling their public service.",
    "The passing of Assembly Bill 2985 aims to improve access to mental health services for jurors after serving on trials involving violent felonies."
  ]
}
```
